description: German outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1972 in Mannheim. Claims to be the largest German MC since 1999, with chapters across Europe and a prospect chapter in Thailand. The club was banned in 1988 but the ban was lifted in 1992. Associated with organized crime including human trafficking, drug and weapons trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: a prospect chapter opened by German expatriates in Pattaya , Thailand in 2007
country_links.context: Gremium has a prospect chapter opened by German expatriates in Pattaya, Thailand.
